22vector<int> Tutorial::s_completableTasks;
23
24
25int Tutorial::m_iTutorialHintDelayTime = 14000;
26int Tutorial::m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime = 7000;
27int Tutorial::m_iTutorialMinimumDisplayMessageTime = 2000;
28int Tutorial::m_iTutorialExtraReminderTime = 13000;
29int Tutorial::m_iTutorialReminderTime = m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime + m_iTutorialExtraReminderTime;
30int Tutorial::m_iTutorialConstraintDelayRemoveTicks = 15;
31int Tutorial::m_iTutorialFreezeTimeValue = 8000;
32
33bool Tutorial::PopupMessageDetails::isSameContent(PopupMessageDetails *other)
34{
35 if(other == nullptr) return false;
36
37 bool textTheSame = (m_messageId == other->m_messageId) && (m_messageString.compare(other->m_messageString) == 0);
38 bool titleTheSame = (m_titleId == other->m_titleId) && (m_titleString.compare(other->m_titleString) == 0);
39 bool promptTheSame = (m_promptId == other->m_promptId) && (m_promptString.compare(other->m_promptString) == 0);
40 return textTheSame && titleTheSame && promptTheSame;
41}
42
43void Tutorial::staticCtor()
44{
45 //
46 /*
47 *****
48 *****
49 THE ORDERING OF THESE SHOULD NOT CHANGE - Although the ordering may not be totally logical due to the order tasks were added, these map
50 to bits in the profile data in this order. New tasks/hints should be added at the end.
51 *****
52 *****
53 */
54 s_completableTasks.push_back( e_Tutorial_State_Inventory_Menu );
55 s_completableTasks.push_back( e_Tutorial_State_2x2Crafting_Menu );

346
347 if( s_completableTasks.size() > TUTORIAL_PROFILE_STORAGE_BITS )
348 {
349 app.DebugPrintf("Warning: Too many tutorial completable tasks added, not enough bits allocated to stored them in the profile data");
350 assert(false);
351 }
352}
353
354Tutorial::Tutorial(int iPad, bool isFullTutorial /*= false*/) : m_iPad( iPad )
355{
356 m_isFullTutorial = isFullTutorial;
357 m_fullTutorialComplete = false;
358 m_allTutorialsComplete = false;
359 hasRequestedUI = false;
360 uiTempDisabled = false;
361 m_hintDisplayed = false;
362 m_freezeTime = false;
363 m_timeFrozen = false;
364 m_UIScene = nullptr;
365 m_allowShow = true;
366 m_bHasTickedOnce = false;
367 m_firstTickTime = 0;
368
369 m_lastMessage = nullptr;
370
371 lastMessageTime = 0;
372 m_iTaskReminders = 0;
373 m_lastMessageState = e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay;
374
375 m_CurrentState = e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay;
376 m_hasStateChanged = false;
377#ifdef _XBOX
378 m_hTutorialScene=nullptr;
379#endif
380
381 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < e_Tutorial_State_Max; ++i)
382 {
383 currentTask[i] = nullptr;
384 currentFailedConstraint[i] = nullptr;
385 }
386
387 // DEFAULT TASKS THAT ALL TUTORIALS SHARE
388 /*
389 *
390 *
391 * GAMEPLAY
392 *
393 */
394
395 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Hold_To_Mine)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new TutorialHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Hold_To_Mine, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_HOLD_TO_MINE, TutorialHint::e_Hint_HoldToMine) );

826 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Villager)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new LookAtEntityHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Villager, this, IDS_DESC_VILLAGER, IDS_VILLAGER, eTYPE_VILLAGER) );
827 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Wither)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new LookAtEntityHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Wither, this, IDS_DESC_WITHER, IDS_WITHER, eTYPE_WITHERBOSS) );
828 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Witch)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new LookAtEntityHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Witch, this, IDS_DESC_WITCH, IDS_WITCH, eTYPE_WITCH) );
829 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Bat)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new LookAtEntityHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Bat, this, IDS_DESC_BAT, IDS_BAT, eTYPE_BAT) );
830 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Horse)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new LookAtEntityHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Horse, this, IDS_DESC_HORSE, IDS_HORSE, eTYPE_HORSE) );
831
832
833 /*
834 * ITEM HINTS
835 */
836 int shovelItems[] = {Item::shovel_wood->id, Item::shovel_stone->id, Item::shovel_iron->id, Item::shovel_gold->id, Item::shovel_diamond->id};
837 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Shovel)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new DiggerItemHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Shovel, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_DIGGER_ITEM_SHOVEL, shovelItems, 5) );
838
839 int hatchetItems[] = {Item::hatchet_wood->id, Item::hatchet_stone->id, Item::hatchet_iron->id, Item::hatchet_gold->id, Item::hatchet_diamond->id};
840 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Hatchet)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new DiggerItemHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Hatchet, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_DIGGER_ITEM_HATCHET, hatchetItems, 5 ) );
841
842 int pickaxeItems[] = {Item::pickAxe_wood->id, Item::pickAxe_stone->id, Item::pickAxe_iron->id, Item::pickAxe_gold->id, Item::pickAxe_diamond->id};
843 if(!isHintCompleted(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Pickaxe)) addHint(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay, new DiggerItemHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Item_Pickaxe, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_DIGGER_ITEM_PICKAXE, pickaxeItems, 5 ) );
844
845 /*
846 *
847 *
848 * INVENTORY
849 *
850 */
851 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Inventory_Menu) )
852 {
853 ProcedureCompoundTask *inventoryOverviewTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
854 inventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_INV_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_INV_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_Inventory) );
855 inventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_INV_PICK_UP, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
856 inventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_INV_MOVE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
857 inventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_INV_DROP, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
858 inventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_INV_INFO, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
859 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Inventory_Menu, inventoryOverviewTask );
860 }
861
862 /*
863 *
864 *
865 * CREATIVE INVENTORY
866 *
867 */
868 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Creative_Inventory_Menu) )
869 {
870 ProcedureCompoundTask *creativeInventoryOverviewTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
871 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_CREATIVE_INV_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_CreativeInventory) );
872 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_PICK_UP, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
873 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_MOVE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
874 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_DROP, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
875 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_NAV, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
876 creativeInventoryOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CREATIVE_INV_INFO, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
877 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Creative_Inventory_Menu, creativeInventoryOverviewTask );
878 }
879
880 /*
881 *
882 *
883 * CRAFTING
884 *
885 */
886 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_2x2Crafting_Menu ) )
887 {
888 ProcedureCompoundTask *craftingOverviewTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
889 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_CRAFT_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_Crafting) );
890 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_NAV, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
891 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_CREATE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
892 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_CRAFT_TABLE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
893 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_INVENTORY, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_X_TO_TOGGLE_DESCRIPTION, false, ACTION_MENU_X) );
894 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_DESCRIPTION, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_X_TO_TOGGLE_INGREDIENTS, false, ACTION_MENU_X) );
895 craftingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_CRAFT_INGREDIENTS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_X_TO_TOGGLE_INVENTORY, false, ACTION_MENU_X) );
896 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_2x2Crafting_Menu, craftingOverviewTask );
897 }
898 // Other tasks can be added in the derived classes
899
900 addHint(e_Tutorial_State_2x2Crafting_Menu, new TutorialHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Always_On, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_CRAFT_NO_INGREDIENTS, TutorialHint::e_Hint_NoIngredients) );
901
902 addHint(e_Tutorial_State_3x3Crafting_Menu, new TutorialHint(e_Tutorial_Hint_Always_On, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_HINT_CRAFT_NO_INGREDIENTS, TutorialHint::e_Hint_NoIngredients) );
903
904 /*
905 *
906 *
907 * FURNACE
908 *
909 */
910 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Furnace_Menu ) )
911 {
912 ProcedureCompoundTask *furnaceOverviewTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
913 furnaceOverviewTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FURNACE_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_FURNACE_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_Furnace) );
914 furnaceOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FURNACE_METHOD, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
915 furnaceOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FURNACE_FUELS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
916 furnaceOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FURNACE_INGREDIENTS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
917 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Furnace_Menu, furnaceOverviewTask );
918 }
919 // Other tasks can be added in the derived classes
920
921 /*
922 *
923 *
924 * BREWING MENU
925 *
926 */
927 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Brewing_Menu ) )
928 {
929 ProcedureCompoundTask *brewingOverviewTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
930 brewingOverviewTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREWING_MENU_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_BREWING_MENU_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_BrewingMenu) );
931 brewingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREWING_MENU_METHOD, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
932 brewingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREWING_MENU_BASIC_INGREDIENTS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
933 brewingOverviewTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREWING_MENU_EXTENDED_INGREDIENTS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );

996 // Other tasks can be added in the derived classes
997
998 /*
999 *
1000 *
1001 * HORSE ENCOUNTER
1002 *
1003 */
1004 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted(e_Tutorial_State_Horse) )
1005 {
1006 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse,
1007 new HorseChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_DONKEY_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_MULE_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_HORSE_OVERVIEW,
1008 true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_Horse) );
1009
1010 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_INTRO, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1011 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_PURPOSE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1012 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_TAMING, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1013 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_TAMING2, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1014
1015 // 4J-JEV: Only force the RideEntityTask if we're on the full-tutorial.
1016 if (isFullTutorial) addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new RideEntityTask(eTYPE_HORSE, this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_RIDE, true, nullptr, false, false, false) );
1017 else addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_RIDE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1018
1019 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_SADDLES, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1020 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_SADDLEBAGS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1021 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_BREEDING, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1022 }
1023
1024 /*
1025 *
1026 *
1027 * HORSE MENU
1028 *
1029 */
1030 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Horse_Menu ) )
1031 {
1032 ProcedureCompoundTask *horseMenuTask = new ProcedureCompoundTask( this );
1033 horseMenuTask->AddTask( new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_MENU_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_HORSE_MENU_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State, eTelemetryTutorial_HorseMenu) );
1034 horseMenuTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_MENU_LAYOUT, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1035 horseMenuTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_MENU_EQUIPMENT, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1036 horseMenuTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HORSE_MENU_SADDLEBAGS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1037 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Horse_Menu, horseMenuTask );

1055 fireworksMenuTask->AddTask( new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_COLOUR, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );

1077
1078 /*

1082 *

1084 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Minecart ) )
1085 {
1086 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Minecart, new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_MINECART_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_MINECART_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_Minecart) );
1087 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Minecart, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_MINECART_RAILS, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );

1089 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Minecart, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_MINECART_PUSHING, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1090 }
1091
1092 /*
1093 *
1094 *
1095 * BOAT
1096 *
1097 */
1098 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Boat ) )
1099 {
1100 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Boat, new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BOAT_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_BOAT_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_Boat) );
1101 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Boat, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BOAT_STEER, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1102 }
1103
1104 /*
1105 *
1106 *
1107 * FISHING
1108 *
1109 */
1110 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Fishing ) )
1111 {
1112 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Fishing, new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FISHING_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_FISHING_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_Fishing) );
1113 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Fishing, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FISHING_CAST, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1114 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Fishing, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FISHING_FISH, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1115 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Fishing, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FISHING_USES, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1116 }
1117
1118 /*
1119 *
1120 *
1121 * BED
1122 *
1123 */
1124 if(isFullTutorial || !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Bed ) )
1125 {
1126 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Bed, new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BED_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_BED_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_Bed) );
1127 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Bed, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BED_PLACEMENT, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1128 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Bed, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BED_MULTIPLAYER, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1129 }
1130
1131 /*
1132 *
1133 *
1134 * FOOD BAR
1135 *
1136 */
1137 if(!isFullTutorial && !isStateCompleted( e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar ) )
1138 {
1139 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar, new ChoiceTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FOOD_BAR_OVERVIEW, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_FOOD_BAR_OVERVIEW, true, ACTION_MENU_A, ACTION_MENU_B, e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints, eTelemetryTutorial_FoodBar) );
1140 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FOOD_BAR_DEPLETE, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1141 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FOOD_BAR_HEAL, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1142 addTask(e_Tutorial_State_Food_Bar, new InfoTask(this, IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FOOD_BAR_FEED, IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_PRESS_A_TO_CONTINUE, true, ACTION_MENU_A) );
1143 }
1144}
1145
1146Tutorial::~Tutorial()
1147{
1148 for(auto& it : m_globalConstraints)
1149 {
1150 delete it;
1151 }
1152 for(auto& message : messages)
1153 {
1154 delete message.second;
1155 }
1156 for(unsigned int i = 0; i < e_Tutorial_State_Max; ++i)
1157 {
1158 for(auto& it : activeTasks[i])
1159 {
1160 delete it;
1161 }
1162 for(auto& it : hints[i])
1163 {
1164 delete it;
1165 }
1166
1167 currentTask[i] = nullptr;
1168 currentFailedConstraint[i] = nullptr;
1169 }
1170}
1171
1172void Tutorial::debugResetPlayerSavedProgress(int iPad)
1173{
1174#if ( defined __PS3__ || defined __ORBIS__ || defined _DURANGO || defined __PSVITA__)
1175 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = (GAME_SETTINGS *)StorageManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(iPad);
1176#else
1177 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = static_cast<GAME_SETTINGS *>(ProfileManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(iPad));
1178#endif
1179 ZeroMemory( pGameSettings->ucTutorialCompletion, TUTORIAL_PROFILE_STORAGE_BYTES );
1180 pGameSettings->uiSpecialTutorialBitmask = 0;
1181}
1182
1183void Tutorial::setCompleted( int completableId )
1184{
1185 //if(app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(m_iPad) && app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask()&(1L<<eDebugSetting_TipsAlwaysOn))
1186 //{
1187 // return;
1188 //}
1189
1190
1191 int completableIndex = -1;
1192 for (int task : s_completableTasks)
1193 {
1194 ++completableIndex;
1195 if( task == completableId )
1196 {
1197 break;
1198 }
1199 }
1200 if( completableIndex >= 0 && completableIndex < TUTORIAL_PROFILE_STORAGE_BITS )
1201 {
1202 // Set the bit for this position
1203#if (defined __PS3__ || defined __ORBIS__ || defined _DURANGO || defined __PSVITA__)
1204 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = (GAME_SETTINGS *)StorageManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(m_iPad);
1205#else
1206 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = static_cast<GAME_SETTINGS *>(ProfileManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(m_iPad));
1207#endif
1208 int arrayIndex = completableIndex >> 3;
1209 int bitIndex = 7 - (completableIndex % 8);
1210 pGameSettings->ucTutorialCompletion[arrayIndex] |= 1<<bitIndex;
1211 // flag a profile write needed
1212 pGameSettings->bSettingsChanged=true;
1213 }
1214}
1215
1216bool Tutorial::getCompleted( int completableId )
1217{
1218 //if(app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(m_iPad) && app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask()&(1L<<eDebugSetting_TipsAlwaysOn))
1219 //{
1220 // return false;
1221 //}
1222
1223 int completableIndex = -1;
1224 for (int it : s_completableTasks)
1225 {
1226 ++completableIndex;
1227 if( it == completableId )
1228 {
1229 break;
1230 }
1231 }
1232 if( completableIndex >= 0 && completableIndex < TUTORIAL_PROFILE_STORAGE_BITS )
1233 {
1234 // Read the bit for this position
1235 //Retrieve the data pointer from the profile
1236#if ( defined __PS3__ || defined __ORBIS__ || defined _DURANGO || defined __PSVITA__)
1237 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = (GAME_SETTINGS *)StorageManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(m_iPad);
1238#else
1239 GAME_SETTINGS *pGameSettings = static_cast<GAME_SETTINGS *>(ProfileManager.GetGameDefinedProfileData(m_iPad));
1240#endif
1241 int arrayIndex = completableIndex >> 3;
1242 int bitIndex = 7 - (completableIndex % 8);
1243 return (pGameSettings->ucTutorialCompletion[arrayIndex] & 1<<bitIndex) == (1<<bitIndex);
1244 }
1245 else
1246 {
1247 return false;
1248 }
1249}
1250
1251bool Tutorial::isStateCompleted( eTutorial_State state )
1252{
1253 return getCompleted(state);
1254}
1255
1256void Tutorial::setStateCompleted( eTutorial_State state )
1257{
1258 setCompleted( state );
1259}
1260
1261bool Tutorial::isHintCompleted( eTutorial_Hint hint )
1262{
1263 return getCompleted(hint);
1264}
1265
1266void Tutorial::setHintCompleted( eTutorial_Hint hint )
1267{
1268 //if(app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(m_iPad) && app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask()&(1L<<eDebugSetting_TipsAlwaysOn))
1269 //{
1270 // return;
1271 //}
1272
1273 setCompleted( hint );
1274}
1275
1276void Tutorial::setHintCompleted( TutorialHint *hint )
1277{
1278 //if(app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(m_iPad) && app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask()&(1L<<eDebugSetting_TipsAlwaysOn))
1279 //{
1280 // return;
1281 //}
1282
1283 eTutorial_Hint hintId = hint->getId();
1284
1285 if( hintId != e_Tutorial_Hint_Always_On )
1286 {
1287 setHintCompleted( hint->getId() );
1288 hints[m_CurrentState].erase( find(hints[m_CurrentState].begin(), hints[m_CurrentState].end(), hint) );
1289 delete hint;
1290 }
1291 // else
1292 // {
1293 // find(hints[m_CurrentState].begin(), hints[m_CurrentState].end(), hint);
1294 // }
1295}
1296
1297void Tutorial::tick()
1298{
1299 // Don't do anything for the first 2 seconds so that the loading screen is gone
1300 if(!m_bHasTickedOnce)
1301 {
1302 int time = GetTickCount();
1303 if(m_firstTickTime == 0)
1304 {
1305 m_firstTickTime = time;
1306 }
1307 else if ( time - m_firstTickTime > 1500 )
1308 {
1309 m_bHasTickedOnce = true;
1310 }
1311 }
1312 if(!m_bHasTickedOnce)
1313 {
1314 return;
1315 }
1316
1317 bool constraintChanged = false;
1318 bool taskChanged = false;
1319
1320 for(unsigned int state = 0; state < e_Tutorial_State_Max; ++state)
1321 {
1322 auto it = constraintsToRemove[state].begin();
1323 while(it != constraintsToRemove[state].end() )
1324 {
1325 ++(*it).second;
1326 if( (*it).second > m_iTutorialConstraintDelayRemoveTicks )
1327 {
1328 TutorialConstraint *c = (*it).first;
1329 constraints[state].erase( find( constraints[state].begin(), constraints[state].end(), c) );
1330 c->setQueuedForRemoval(false);
1331 it = constraintsToRemove[state].erase( it );
1332
1333 if( c->getDeleteOnDeactivate() )
1334 {
1335 delete c;
1336 }
1337 }
1338 else
1339 {
1340 ++it;
1341 }
1342 }
1343 }
1344
1345 // 4J Stu TODO - Make this a constraint
1346 Minecraft *pMinecraft = Minecraft::GetInstance();
1347 if(m_freezeTime && !m_timeFrozen && !m_fullTutorialComplete )
1348 {
1349 // Need to set the time on both levels to stop the flickering as the local level
1350 // tries to predict the time
1351 MinecraftServer::SetTimeOfDay(m_iTutorialFreezeTimeValue);
1352 pMinecraft->level->setDayTime(m_iTutorialFreezeTimeValue); // Always daytime
1353 app.SetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_DoDaylightCycle,0);
1354 m_timeFrozen = true;
1355 }
1356 else if(m_freezeTime && m_timeFrozen && m_fullTutorialComplete)
1357 {
1358 MinecraftServer::SetTimeOfDay(m_iTutorialFreezeTimeValue);
1359 pMinecraft->level->setDayTime(m_iTutorialFreezeTimeValue);
1360 app.SetGameHostOption(eGameHostOption_DoDaylightCycle,1);
1361 m_timeFrozen = false;
1362 }
1363
1364 if(!m_allowShow)
1365 {
1366 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && (!currentTask[m_CurrentState]->AllowFade() || (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime ) > GetTickCount() ) )
1367 {
1368 uiTempDisabled = true;
1369 }
1370 ui.SetTutorialVisible( m_iPad, false );
1371 return;
1372 }
1373
1374
1375 if(!hasRequestedUI )
1376 {
1377#ifdef _XBOX
1378 m_bSceneIsSplitscreen=app.GetLocalPlayerCount()>1;
1379 if(m_bSceneIsSplitscreen)
1380 {
1381 app.NavigateToScene(m_iPad, eUIComponent_TutorialPopup,(void *)this, false, false, &m_hTutorialScene);
1382 }
1383 else
1384 {
1385 app.NavigateToScene(m_iPad, eUIComponent_TutorialPopup,(void *)this, false, false, &m_hTutorialScene);
1386 }
1387#else
1388 ui.SetTutorial(m_iPad, this);
1389#endif
1390 hasRequestedUI = true;
1391 }
1392 else
1393 {
1394 // if we've changed mode, we may need to change scene
1395 if(m_bSceneIsSplitscreen!=(app.GetLocalPlayerCount()>1))
1396 {
1397#ifdef _XBOX
1398 app.TutorialSceneNavigateBack(m_iPad);
1399 m_bSceneIsSplitscreen=app.GetLocalPlayerCount()>1;
1400 if(m_bSceneIsSplitscreen)
1401 {
1402 app.NavigateToScene(m_iPad, eUIComponent_TutorialPopup,(void *)this, false, false, &m_hTutorialScene);
1403 }
1404 else
1405 {
1406 app.NavigateToScene(m_iPad, eUIComponent_TutorialPopup,(void *)this, false, false, &m_hTutorialScene);
1407 }
1408#else
1409 ui.SetTutorial(m_iPad, this);
1410#endif
1411 }
1412 }
1413
1414 if(ui.IsPauseMenuDisplayed( m_iPad ) )
1415 {
1416 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && (!currentTask[m_CurrentState]->AllowFade() || (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime ) > GetTickCount() ) )
1417 {
1418 uiTempDisabled = true;
1419 }
1420 ui.SetTutorialVisible( m_iPad, false );
1421 return;
1422 }
1423 if( uiTempDisabled )
1424 {
1425 ui.SetTutorialVisible( m_iPad, true );
1426 lastMessageTime = GetTickCount();
1427 uiTempDisabled = false;
1428 }
1429
1430 // Check constraints
1431 for (auto& constraint : m_globalConstraints)
1432 {
1433 constraint->tick(m_iPad);
1434 }
1435
1436 // Check hints
1437 int hintNeeded = -1;
1438 if(!m_hintDisplayed)
1439 {
1440 // 4J Stu - TU-1 interim
1441 // Allow turning off all the hints
1442 bool hintsOn = m_isFullTutorial || app.GetGameSettings(m_iPad,eGameSetting_Hints);
1443
1444 if(hintsOn)
1445 {
1446 for (auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1447 {
1448 hintNeeded = hint->tick();
1449 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1450 {
1451 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1452 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1453 message->m_allowFade = hint->allowFade();
1454 message->m_forceDisplay = true;
1455 setMessage( hint, message );
1456 break;
1457 }
1458 }
1459 }
1460 }
1461
1462 // Check constraints
1463 // Only need to update these if we aren't already failing something
1464 if( !m_allTutorialsComplete && (currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] == nullptr || currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState]->isConstraintSatisfied(m_iPad)) )
1465 {
1466 if( currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState]->isConstraintSatisfied(m_iPad) )
1467 {
1468 constraintChanged = true;
1469 currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] = nullptr;
1470 }
1471 for (auto& constraint : constraints[m_CurrentState])
1472 {
1473 if( !constraint->isConstraintSatisfied(m_iPad) && constraint->isConstraintRestrictive(m_iPad) )
1474 {
1475 constraintChanged = true;
1476 currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] = constraint;
1477 }
1478 }
1479 }
1480
1481 if( !m_allTutorialsComplete && currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] == nullptr )
1482 {
1483 // Update tasks
1484 bool isCurrentTask = true;
1485 auto it = activeTasks[m_CurrentState].begin();
1486 while(activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() > 0 && it != activeTasks[m_CurrentState].end())
1487 {
1488 TutorialTask *task = *it;
1489 if( isCurrentTask || task->isPreCompletionEnabled() )
1490 {
1491 isCurrentTask = false;
1492 if(
1493 ( !task->ShowMinimumTime() || ( task->hasBeenActivated() && (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialMinimumDisplayMessageTime ) < GetTickCount() ) )
1494 && task->isCompleted()
1495 )
1496 {
1497 eTutorial_CompletionAction compAction = task->getCompletionAction();
1498 it = activeTasks[m_CurrentState].erase( it );
1499 delete task;
1500 task = nullptr;
1501
1502 if( activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() > 0 )
1503 {
1504 switch( compAction )
1505 {
1506 case e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State_Gameplay_Constraints:
1507 {
1508 // 4J Stu - Move the delayed constraints to the gameplay state so that they are in
1509 // effect for a bit longer
1510 auto itCon = constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].begin();
1511 while(itCon != constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].end() )
1512 {
1513 constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].push_back(itCon->first);
1514 constraintsToRemove[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].push_back( pair<TutorialConstraint *, unsigned char>(itCon->first, itCon->second) );
1515
1516 constraints[m_CurrentState].erase( find( constraints[m_CurrentState].begin(), constraints[m_CurrentState].end(), itCon->first) );
1517 itCon = constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].erase(itCon);
1518 }
1519 }
1520 // Fall through the the normal complete state
1521 case e_Tutorial_Completion_Complete_State:
1522 for (auto& itRem : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
1523 {
1524 delete itRem;
1525 }
1526 activeTasks[m_CurrentState].clear();
1527 break;
1528 case e_Tutorial_Completion_Jump_To_Last_Task:
1529 {
1530 TutorialTask *lastTask = activeTasks[m_CurrentState].at( activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() - 1 );
1531 activeTasks[m_CurrentState].pop_back();
1532 for(auto& itRem : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
1533 {
1534 delete itRem;
1535 }
1536 activeTasks[m_CurrentState].clear();
1537 activeTasks[m_CurrentState].push_back( lastTask );
1538 it = activeTasks[m_CurrentState].begin();
1539 }
1540 break;
1541 case e_Tutorial_Completion_None:
1542 default:
1543 break;
1544 }
1545 }
1546
1547 if( activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() > 0 )
1548 {
1549 currentTask[m_CurrentState] = activeTasks[m_CurrentState][0];
1550 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->setAsCurrentTask();
1551 }
1552 else
1553 {
1554 setStateCompleted( m_CurrentState );
1555
1556 currentTask[m_CurrentState] = nullptr;
1557 }
1558 taskChanged = true;
1559
1560 // If we can complete this early, check if we can complete it right now
1561 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && currentTask[m_CurrentState]->isPreCompletionEnabled() )
1562 {
1563 isCurrentTask = true;
1564 }
1565 }
1566 else
1567 {
1568 ++it;
1569 }
1570 if( task != nullptr && task->ShowMinimumTime() && task->hasBeenActivated() && (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialMinimumDisplayMessageTime ) < GetTickCount() )
1571 {
1572 task->setShownForMinimumTime();
1573
1574 if( !m_hintDisplayed )
1575 {
1576 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1577 message->m_messageId = task->getDescriptionId();
1578 message->m_promptId = task->getPromptId();
1579 message->m_allowFade = task->AllowFade();
1580 message->m_replaceCurrent = true;
1581 setMessage( message );
1582 }
1583 }
1584 }
1585 else
1586 {
1587 ++it;
1588 }
1589 }
1590
1591 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] == nullptr && activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() > 0 )
1592 {
1593 currentTask[m_CurrentState] = activeTasks[m_CurrentState][0];
1594 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->setAsCurrentTask();
1595 taskChanged = true;
1596 }
1597 }
1598
1599 if(!m_allTutorialsComplete && (taskChanged || m_hasStateChanged) )
1600 {
1601 bool allComplete = true;
1602 for(unsigned int state = 0; state < e_Tutorial_State_Max; ++state)
1603 {
1604 if(activeTasks[state].size() > 0 )
1605 {
1606 allComplete = false;
1607 break;
1608 }
1609 if(state==e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay)
1610 {
1611 m_fullTutorialComplete = true;
1612 Minecraft::GetInstance()->playerLeftTutorial(m_iPad);
1613 }
1614 }
1615 if(allComplete)
1616 m_allTutorialsComplete = true;
1617 }
1618
1619 if( constraintChanged || taskChanged || m_hasStateChanged ||
1620 (currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] == nullptr && currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && (m_lastMessage == nullptr || currentTask[m_CurrentState]->getDescriptionId() != m_lastMessage->m_messageId) && !m_hintDisplayed)
1621 )
1622 {
1623 if( currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] != nullptr )
1624 {
1625 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1626 message->m_messageId = currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState]->getDescriptionId();
1627 message->m_allowFade = false;
1628 setMessage( message );
1629 }
1630 else if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr )
1631 {
1632 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1633 message->m_messageId = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->getDescriptionId();
1634 message->m_promptId = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->getPromptId();
1635 message->m_allowFade = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->AllowFade();
1636 setMessage( message );
1637 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->TaskReminders()? m_iTaskReminders = 1 : m_iTaskReminders = 0;
1638 }
1639 else
1640 {
1641 setMessage( nullptr );
1642 }
1643 }
1644
1645 if(m_hintDisplayed && (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime ) < GetTickCount() )
1646 {
1647 m_hintDisplayed = false;
1648 }
1649
1650 if( currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] == nullptr && currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && (m_iTaskReminders!=0) && (lastMessageTime + (m_iTaskReminders * m_iTutorialReminderTime) ) < GetTickCount() )
1651 {
1652 // Reminder
1653 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1654 message->m_messageId = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->getDescriptionId();
1655 message->m_promptId = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->getPromptId();
1656 message->m_allowFade = currentTask[m_CurrentState]->AllowFade();
1657 message->m_isReminder = true;
1658 setMessage( message );
1659 ++m_iTaskReminders;
1660 if( m_iTaskReminders > 1 )
1661 m_iTaskReminders = 1;
1662 }
1663
1664 m_hasStateChanged = false;
1665
1666 // If we have completed this state, and it is one that occurs during normal gameplay then change back to the gameplay track
1667 if( m_CurrentState != e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay && activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() == 0 && (isSelectedItemState() || !ui.GetMenuDisplayed(m_iPad) ) )
1668 {
1669 this->changeTutorialState( e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay );
1670 }
1671}
1672
1673bool Tutorial::setMessage(PopupMessageDetails *message)
1674{
1675 if(message != nullptr && !message->m_forceDisplay &&
1676 m_lastMessageState == m_CurrentState &&
1677 message->isSameContent(m_lastMessage) &&
1678 ( !message->m_isReminder || ( (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialReminderTime ) > GetTickCount() && message->m_isReminder ) )
1679 )
1680 {
1681 delete message;
1682 return false;
1683 }
1684
1685 if(message != nullptr && (message->m_messageId > 0 || !message->m_messageString.empty()) )
1686 {
1687 m_lastMessageState = m_CurrentState;
1688
1689 if(!message->m_replaceCurrent) lastMessageTime = GetTickCount();
1690
1691 wstring text;
1692 if(!message->m_messageString.empty())
1693 {
1694 text = message->m_messageString;
1695 }
1696 else
1697 {
1698 auto it = messages.find(message->m_messageId);
1699 if( it != messages.end() && it->second != nullptr )
1700 {
1701 TutorialMessage *messageString = it->second;
1702 text = wstring( messageString->getMessageForDisplay() );
1703
1704 // 4J Stu - Quick fix for boat tutorial being incorrect
1705 if(message->m_messageId == IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BOAT_OVERVIEW)
1706 {
1707 text = replaceAll(text, L"{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_USE*}", L"{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_DISMOUNT*}");
1708 }
1709 }
1710 else
1711 {
1712 text = wstring( app.GetString(message->m_messageId) );
1713
1714 // 4J Stu - Quick fix for boat tutorial being incorrect
1715 if(message->m_messageId == IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BOAT_OVERVIEW)
1716 {
1717 text = replaceAll(text, L"{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_USE*}", L"{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_DISMOUNT*}");
1718 }
1719 }
1720 }
1721
1722 if(!message->m_promptString.empty())
1723 {
1724 text.append(message->m_promptString);
1725 }
1726 else if(message->m_promptId >= 0)
1727 {
1728 auto it = messages.find(message->m_promptId);
1729 if(it != messages.end() && it->second != nullptr)
1730 {
1731 TutorialMessage *prompt = it->second;
1732 text.append( prompt->getMessageForDisplay() );
1733 }
1734 }
1735
1736 wstring title;
1737 TutorialPopupInfo popupInfo;
1738 popupInfo.interactScene = m_UIScene;
1739 popupInfo.desc = text.c_str();
1740 popupInfo.icon = message->m_icon;
1741 popupInfo.iAuxVal = message->m_iAuxVal;
1742 popupInfo.allowFade = message->m_allowFade;
1743 popupInfo.isReminder = message->m_isReminder;
1744 popupInfo.tutorial = this;
1745 if( !message->m_titleString.empty() || message->m_titleId > 0 )
1746 {
1747 if(message->m_titleString.empty()) title = wstring( app.GetString(message->m_titleId) );
1748 else title = message->m_titleString;
1749
1750 popupInfo.title = title.c_str();
1751 ui.SetTutorialDescription( m_iPad, &popupInfo );
1752 }
1753 else
1754 {
1755 ui.SetTutorialDescription( m_iPad, &popupInfo );
1756 }
1757 }
1758 else if( (m_lastMessage != nullptr && m_lastMessage->m_messageId != -1) ) //&& (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialReminderTime ) > GetTickCount() )
1759 {
1760 // This should cause the popup to dissappear
1761 TutorialPopupInfo popupInfo;
1762 popupInfo.interactScene = m_UIScene;
1763 popupInfo.tutorial = this;
1764 ui.SetTutorialDescription( m_iPad, &popupInfo );
1765 }
1766
1767 if(m_lastMessage != nullptr) delete m_lastMessage;
1768 m_lastMessage = message;
1769
1770 return true;
1771}
1772
1773bool Tutorial::setMessage(TutorialHint *hint, PopupMessageDetails *message)
1774{
1775 // 4J Stu - TU-1 interim
1776 // Allow turning off all the hints
1777 bool hintsOn = m_isFullTutorial || (app.GetGameSettings(m_iPad,eGameSetting_Hints) && app.GetGameSettings(m_iPad,eGameSetting_DisplayHUD));
1778
1779 bool messageShown = false;
1780 DWORD time = GetTickCount();
1781 if(message != nullptr && (message->m_forceDisplay || hintsOn) &&
1782 (!message->m_delay ||
1783 (
1784 (m_hintDisplayed && (time - m_lastHintDisplayedTime) > m_iTutorialHintDelayTime ) ||
1785 (!m_hintDisplayed && (time - lastMessageTime) > m_iTutorialMinimumDisplayMessageTime )
1786 )
1787 )
1788 )
1789 {
1790 messageShown = setMessage( message );
1791
1792 if(messageShown)
1793 {
1794 m_lastHintDisplayedTime = time;
1795 m_hintDisplayed = true;
1796 if(hint!=nullptr) setHintCompleted( hint );
1797 }
1798 }
1799 return messageShown;
1800}
1801
1802bool Tutorial::setMessage(const wstring &messageString, int icon, int auxValue)
1803{
1804 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1805 message->m_messageString = messageString;
1806 message->m_icon = icon;
1807 message->m_iAuxVal = auxValue;
1808 message->m_forceDisplay = true;
1809
1810 return setMessage(message);
1811}
1812
1813void Tutorial::showTutorialPopup(bool show)
1814{
1815 m_allowShow = show;
1816
1817 if(!show)
1818 {
1819 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && (!currentTask[m_CurrentState]->AllowFade() || (lastMessageTime + m_iTutorialDisplayMessageTime ) > GetTickCount() ) )
1820 {
1821 uiTempDisabled = true;
1822 }
1823 ui.SetTutorialVisible( m_iPad, show );
1824 }
1825}
1826
1827void Tutorial::useItemOn(Level *level, shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item, int x, int y, int z, bool bTestUseOnly)
1828{
1829 for(auto& task : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
1830 {
1831 task->useItemOn(level, item, x, y, z, bTestUseOnly);
1832 }
1833}
1834
1835void Tutorial::useItemOn(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item, bool bTestUseOnly)
1836{
1837 for(auto& task : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
1838 {
1839 task->useItem(item, bTestUseOnly);
1840 }
1841}
1842
1843void Tutorial::completeUsingItem(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item)
1844{
1845 for(auto task : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
1846 {
1847 task->completeUsingItem(item);
1848 }
1849
1850 // Fix for #46922 - TU5: UI: Player receives a reminder that he is hungry while "hunger bar" is full (triggered in split-screen mode)
1851 if(m_CurrentState != e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay)
1852 {
1853 for(auto task : activeTasks[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay])
1854 {
1855 task->completeUsingItem(item);
1856 }
1857 }
1858}
1859
1860void Tutorial::startDestroyBlock(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item, Tile *tile)
1861{
1862 int hintNeeded = -1;
1863 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1864 {
1865 hintNeeded = hint->startDestroyBlock(item, tile);
1866 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1867 {
1868 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1869 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1870 setMessage( hint, message );
1871 break;
1872 }
1873 }
1874}
1875
1876void Tutorial::destroyBlock(Tile *tile)
1877{
1878 int hintNeeded = -1;
1879 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1880 {
1881 hintNeeded = hint->destroyBlock(tile);
1882 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1883 {
1884 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1885 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1886 setMessage( hint, message );
1887 break;
1888 }
1889 }
1890}
1891
1892void Tutorial::attack(shared_ptr<Player> player, shared_ptr<Entity> entity)
1893{
1894 int hintNeeded = -1;
1895 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1896 {
1897 hintNeeded = hint->attack(player->inventory->getSelected(), entity);
1898 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1899 {
1900 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1901 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1902 setMessage( hint, message );
1903 break;
1904 }
1905
1906 }
1907}
1908
1909void Tutorial::itemDamaged(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item)
1910{
1911 int hintNeeded = -1;
1912 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1913 {
1914 hintNeeded = hint->itemDamaged(item);
1915 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1916 {
1917 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1918 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1919 setMessage( hint, message );
1920 break;
1921 }
1922
1923 }
1924}
1925
1926void Tutorial::handleUIInput(int iAction)
1927{
1928 if( m_hintDisplayed ) return;
1929
1930 if(currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr)
1931 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->handleUIInput(iAction);
1932}
1933
1934void Tutorial::createItemSelected(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item, bool canMake)
1935{
1936 int hintNeeded = -1;
1937 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1938 {
1939 hintNeeded = hint->createItemSelected(item, canMake);
1940 if(hintNeeded >= 0)
1941 {
1942 PopupMessageDetails *message = new PopupMessageDetails();
1943 message->m_messageId = hintNeeded;
1944 setMessage( hint, message );
1945 break;
1946 }
1947
1948 }
1949}
1950
1951void Tutorial::onCrafted(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item)
1952{
1953 for(auto& subtasks : activeTasks)
1954 {
1955 for(auto& task : subtasks)
1956 {
1957 task->onCrafted(item);
1958 }
1959 }
1960}
1961
1962void Tutorial::onTake(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item, unsigned int invItemCountAnyAux, unsigned int invItemCountThisAux)
1963{
1964 if( !m_hintDisplayed )
1965 {
1966 bool hintNeeded = false;
1967 for(auto hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
1968 {
1969 hintNeeded = hint->onTake(item);
1970 if(hintNeeded)
1971 {
1972 break;
1973 }
1974 }
1975 }
1976
1977 for(auto& subtasks : activeTasks)
1978 {
1979 for(auto& task : subtasks)
1980 {
1981 task->onTake(item, invItemCountAnyAux, invItemCountThisAux);
1982 }
1983 }
1984}
1985
1986void Tutorial::onSelectedItemChanged(shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item)
1987{
1988 // We only handle this if we are in a state that allows changing based on the selected item
1989 // Menus and states like riding in a minecart will NOT allow this
1990 if( isSelectedItemState() )
1991 {
1992 if(item != nullptr)
1993 {
1994 switch(item->id)
1995 {
1996 case Item::fishingRod_Id:
1997 changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Fishing);
1998 break;
1999 default:
2000 changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay);
2001 break;
2002 }
2003 }
2004 else
2005 {
2006 changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay);
2007 }
2008 }
2009}
2010
2011void Tutorial::onLookAt(int id, int iData)
2012{
2013 if( m_hintDisplayed ) return;
2014
2015 bool hintNeeded = false;
2016 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
2017 {
2018 hintNeeded = hint->onLookAt(id, iData);
2019 if(hintNeeded)
2020 {
2021 break;
2022 }
2023 }
2024
2025 if( m_CurrentState == e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay )
2026 {
2027 if(id > 0)
2028 {
2029 switch(id)
2030 {
2031 case Tile::bed_Id:
2032 changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Bed);
2033 break;
2034 default:
2035 break;
2036 }
2037 }
2038 }
2039}
2040
2041void Tutorial::onLookAtEntity(shared_ptr<Entity> entity)
2042{
2043 if( m_hintDisplayed ) return;
2044
2045 bool hintNeeded = false;
2046 for(auto& hint : hints[m_CurrentState])
2047 {
2048 hintNeeded = hint->onLookAtEntity(entity->GetType());
2049 if(hintNeeded)
2050 {
2051 break;
2052 }
2053 }
2054
2055 if ( (m_CurrentState == e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay) && entity->instanceof(eTYPE_HORSE) )
2056 {
2057 changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Horse);
2058 }
2059
2060 for (auto& it : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
2061 {
2062 it->onLookAtEntity(entity);
2063 }
2064}
2065
2066void Tutorial::onRideEntity(shared_ptr<Entity> entity)
2067{
2068 if(m_CurrentState == e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay)
2069 {
2070 switch (entity->GetType())
2071 {
2072 case eTYPE_MINECART: changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Minecart); break;
2073 case eTYPE_BOAT: changeTutorialState(e_Tutorial_State_Riding_Boat); break;
2074 }
2075 }
2076
2077 for (auto& it : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
2078 {
2079 it->onRideEntity(entity);
2080 }
2081}
2082
2083void Tutorial::onEffectChanged(MobEffect *effect, bool bRemoved)
2084{
2085 for(auto& task : activeTasks[m_CurrentState])
2086 {
2087 task->onEffectChanged(effect,bRemoved);
2088 }
2089}
2090
2091bool Tutorial::canMoveToPosition(double xo, double yo, double zo, double xt, double yt, double zt)
2092{
2093 bool allowed = true;
2094 for(auto& constraint : constraints[m_CurrentState])
2095 {
2096 if( !constraint->isConstraintSatisfied(m_iPad) && !constraint->canMoveToPosition(xo,yo,zo,xt,yt,zt) )
2097 {
2098 allowed = false;
2099 break;
2100 }
2101 }
2102 return allowed;
2103}
2104
2105bool Tutorial::isInputAllowed(int mapping)
2106{
2107 if( m_hintDisplayed ) return true;
2108
2109 // If the player is under water then allow all keypresses so they can jump out
2110 if( Minecraft::GetInstance()->localplayers[m_iPad]->isUnderLiquid(Material::water) ) return true;
2111
2112 bool allowed = true;
2113 for(auto& constraint : constraints[m_CurrentState])
2114 {
2115 if( constraint->isMappingConstrained( m_iPad, mapping ) )
2116 {
2117 allowed = false;
2118 break;
2119 }
2120 }
2121 return allowed;
2122}
2123
2124vector<TutorialTask *> *Tutorial::getTasks()
2125{
2126 return &tasks;
2127}
2128
2129unsigned int Tutorial::getCurrentTaskIndex()
2130{
2131 unsigned int index = 0;
2132 for(const auto& task : tasks)
2133 {
2134 if(task == currentTask[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay])
2135 break;
2136
2137 ++index;
2138 }
2139 return index;
2140}
2141
2142void Tutorial::AddGlobalConstraint(TutorialConstraint *c)
2143{
2144 m_globalConstraints.push_back(c);
2145}
2146
2147void Tutorial::AddConstraint(TutorialConstraint *c)
2148{
2149 constraints[m_CurrentState].push_back(c);
2150}
2151
2152void Tutorial::RemoveConstraint(TutorialConstraint *c, bool delayedRemove /*= false*/)
2153{
2154 if( currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] == c )
2155 currentFailedConstraint[m_CurrentState] = nullptr;
2156
2157 if( c->getQueuedForRemoval() )
2158 {
2159 // If it is already queued for removal, remove it on the next tick
2160 /*for(auto& it : constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState])
2161 {
2162 if( it.first == c )
2163 {
2164 it.second = m_iTutorialConstraintDelayRemoveTicks;
2165 break;
2166 }
2167 }*/
2168 }
2169 else if(delayedRemove)
2170 {
2171 c->setQueuedForRemoval(true);
2172 constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].emplace_back(c, 0);
2173 }
2174 else
2175 {
2176 for (auto it = constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].begin(); it != constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].end(); ++it)
2177 {
2178 if( it->first == c )
2179 {
2180 constraintsToRemove[m_CurrentState].erase( it );
2181 break;
2182 }
2183 }
2184
2185 auto it = find(constraints[m_CurrentState].begin(), constraints[m_CurrentState].end(), c);
2186 if( it != constraints[m_CurrentState].end() ) constraints[m_CurrentState].erase( find( constraints[m_CurrentState].begin(), constraints[m_CurrentState].end(), c) );
2187
2188 // It may be in the gameplay list, so remove it from there if it is
2189 it = find( constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].begin(), constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].end(), c);
2190 if( it != constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].end() ) constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].erase( find( constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].begin(), constraints[e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay].end(), c) );
2191 }
2192}
2193
2194void Tutorial::addTask(eTutorial_State state, TutorialTask *t)
2195{
2196 if( state == e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay )
2197 {
2198 tasks.push_back(t);
2199 }
2200 activeTasks[state].push_back(t);
2201}
2202
2203void Tutorial::addHint(eTutorial_State state, TutorialHint *h)
2204{
2205 hints[state].push_back(h);
2206}
2207
2208void Tutorial::addMessage(int messageId, bool limitRepeats /*= false*/, unsigned char numRepeats /*= TUTORIAL_MESSAGE_DEFAULT_SHOW*/)
2209{
2210 if(messageId >= 0 && messages.find(messageId)==messages.end())
2211 messages[messageId] = new TutorialMessage(messageId, limitRepeats, numRepeats);
2212}
2213
2214#ifdef _XBOX
2215void Tutorial::changeTutorialState(eTutorial_State newState, CXuiScene *scene /*= nullptr*/)
2216#else
2217void Tutorial::changeTutorialState(eTutorial_State newState, UIScene *scene /*= nullptr*/)
2218#endif
2219{
2220 if(newState == m_CurrentState)
2221 {
2222 // If clearing the scene, make sure that the tutorial popup has its reference to this scene removed
2223#ifndef _XBOX
2224 if( scene == nullptr )
2225 {
2226 ui.RemoveInteractSceneReference(m_iPad, m_UIScene);
2227 }
2228#endif
2229 m_UIScene = scene;
2230 return;
2231 }
2232 // 4J Stu - TU-1 interim
2233 // Allow turning off all the hints
2234 bool hintsOn = m_isFullTutorial || app.GetGameSettings(m_iPad,eGameSetting_Hints);
2235
2236 if(hintsOn)
2237 {
2238 // If we have completed this state, and it is one that occurs during normal gameplay then change back to the gameplay track
2239 if( newState != e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay && activeTasks[newState].size() == 0 && !ui.GetMenuDisplayed(m_iPad) )
2240 {
2241 return;
2242 }
2243
2244 // The action that caused the change of state may also have completed the current task
2245 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr && currentTask[m_CurrentState]->isCompleted() )
2246 {
2247 activeTasks[m_CurrentState].erase( find( activeTasks[m_CurrentState].begin(), activeTasks[m_CurrentState].end(), currentTask[m_CurrentState]) );
2248
2249 if( activeTasks[m_CurrentState].size() > 0 )
2250 {
2251 currentTask[m_CurrentState] = activeTasks[m_CurrentState][0];
2252 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->setAsCurrentTask();
2253 }
2254 else
2255 {
2256 currentTask[m_CurrentState] = nullptr;
2257 }
2258 }
2259
2260 if( currentTask[m_CurrentState] != nullptr )
2261 {
2262 currentTask[m_CurrentState]->onStateChange(newState);
2263 }
2264
2265 // Make sure that the current message is cleared
2266 setMessage( nullptr );
2267
2268 // If clearing the scene, make sure that the tutorial popup has its reference to this scene removed
2269#ifndef _XBOX
2270 if( scene == nullptr )
2271 {
2272 ui.RemoveInteractSceneReference(m_iPad, m_UIScene);
2273 }
2274#endif
2275 m_UIScene = scene;
2276
2277
2278 if( m_CurrentState != newState )
2279 {
2280 for (auto& task : activeTasks[newState] )
2281 {
2282 task->onStateChange(newState);
2283 }
2284 m_CurrentState = newState;
2285 m_hasStateChanged = true;
2286 m_hintDisplayed = false;
2287 }
2288 }
2289}
2290
2291bool Tutorial::isSelectedItemState()
2292{
2293 bool isSelectedItemState = false;
2294 switch(m_CurrentState)
2295 {
2296 case e_Tutorial_State_Gameplay:
2297 case e_Tutorial_State_Fishing:
2298 isSelectedItemState = true;
2299 break;
2300 default:
2301 break;
2302 }
2303 return isSelectedItemState;
2304}
